{{Quote|Where's the former governor?|General [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to Governor [[Forridel]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
The '''Governor of Corulag''' was the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], the governor surrendered to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and ruled as a collaborationist. After Corulag was [[Battle of Corulag (Yuuzhan Vong War)|liberated]], the governor was [[Death/Legends|hanged]] in the streets of [[Curamelle/Legends|Curamelle]] by a lynch mob which then desecrated the corpse. [[Forridel]] was proclaimed the new governor by the resistance.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}} {{C|as a corpse}}
